chapter_title.en: Seeking the Place to Relieve Oneself and the Etiquettes of Entering and Exiting

text: 56 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «طُولُ اَلْجُلُوسِ عَلَى اَلْخَلاَءِ يُورِثُ اَلْبَاسُورَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.56 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"Prolonged sitting in the restroom causes hemorrhoids”.
